# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.

Prevent sqs policy too permissive.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'

Resources:
  MySnsTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: !Sub "my-sns-topic-${AWS::Region}"

  MySqsQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: !Sub "my-sqs-queue-${AWS::Region}"
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600

  SqsPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - Ref: MySqsQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublishMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sns.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MySqsQueue.Arn

  SnsTopicPolicy:
    Type: AWS::SNS::TopicPolicy
    Properties:
      Topics:
        - Ref: MySnsTopic
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          -
            Sid: AllowPublishMessage
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service: sqs.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sns:Publish
            Resource: !GetAtt MySnsTopic.Arn

Outputs:
  SqsQueueUrl:
    Value: !GetAtt MySqsQueue.QueueUrl
    Description: SQS Queue URL
